learning.leakage_note: exclude NanoIFIRCds queries, qrels, and positive biomedical articles
useful_training_data: PubMed and PMC clinical case retrieval
biomedical diagnosis treatment and test retrieval data

synthetic_data.document_generation: biomedical article titles and abstracts about diagnosis, testing, and treatment
synthetic_data.question_generation: patient vignettes with explicit diagnosis/test/treatment retrieval instructions
synthetic_data.answerability: positives should provide information useful for the patient-specific clinical need

references.title: Overview of the TREC 2015 Clinical Decision Support Track
IFIR: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Evaluating Instruction-Following in Expert-Domain Information Retrieval
